WthC_CM-RRA.job_description:
Although to me, this is just {==a game==}, perhaps you might truly risk your life for it...?
But if you really wish to uncover the {==mysteries of another world==}...
Why not join this waltz, clashing with {==Witch Phantom==}?
But do remember... From the moment you accept this invitation, your fate no longer belongs to you alone...
From the constellation Perseus... {==Starry Traveler==}?
For now... even someone as merciful as me will offer some small advice to the ignorant~
The Artistic Witch, my heart's Moon, is an overly protected artist, whose phantom commands a fleet with a balance between number and quality. Its powerful deterrence and strong damage resistance make it extremely hard to destroy.
Prepare for gradual advancement and massive damage... The chosen ones attempting to accept this invitation...
WthC_CM-RRA.job_comm_reply:
No matter what...
......
It must...
......
Absolutely must...
......
Return to...
......
{==where she is...==}
WthC_CM-RRA.job_intel_success:
Heh... You seem well? Looks like you have some ability, just as I imagined?
The first game is over, enjoy everything you deserve. It's all yours now... Chosen one...
WthC_CM-RRA.job_intel_expired: This fate ends here... But never forget, you still have the potential for another chance... Chosen one...
WthC_CM-RRA.job_pick_option: You will come to like her...
WthC_CM-RRA.fleet_name: The Phantom Fleet of the Artistic Witch

WthC_CM-Cross.job_description:
Heh... Looks like you're still {==not quite satisfied==}...?
Perhaps for someone like you, an expert commander from the Persean Sector, a not-so-glamorous {==opening ceremony==} doesn't fully quench your inner desires?
But don't rush... At least the game between us has {==only just begun==}~
For now... even someone as merciful as me will offer some small advice to the ignorant~
The Cross Witch, Rosalia Cross, is a preacher well-versed in deception and illusion. Her phantom commands an enormous and terrifying fleet, with lethal projectiles and difficult-to-handle EMPs that will wear down the will of mortals.
Prepare for large-scale suppression and repairing wartime damage, chosen one attempting to accept this invitation...
WthC_CM-Cross.job_comm_reply:
You believe in...
......
Which god...? 
......
Heh... Hehe...
......
Hahahaha...
......
{==Anyway, they... don't exist!==}
WthC_CM-Cross.job_intel_success:
Another game has come to an end~ And what awaits the victor is, of course, the spoils~ Take whatever you desire~
At least for me, money and material things are the cheapest things in this world...
WthC_CM-Cross.job_intel_expired: This fate ends here... But never forget, you still have the potential for another chance... Chosen one...
WthC_CM-Cross.fleet_name: The Phantom Fleet of the Cross Witch

WthC_CM-IE.job_description:
It seems like... you're {==getting into the groove==}...?
Perhaps I should start calling you... {=="The Killing Machine from the Persean Sector"}?
Alright~ Just a joke, but sometimes a little {==self-reflection==} isn't such a bad thing...
Like thinking, "Why am I always so skilled at this {==bloody business==}?"
I hope after this... {==she==} will reveal some of the answers to you~
For now... even someone as merciful as me will offer some small advice to the ignorant~
The Primordial Witch,is a world-renowned expert of energy and elements. Her phantom commands a fleet that maintains absolute balance, with long-range, deadly beams and indestructible shields that easily trap unsteady foes in a dilemma of advance or retreat.
Prepare for dealing with strong shields and prolonged stalemates, chosen one trying to accept this invitation... "Killing Machine"?
WthC_CM-IE.job_intel_success:
Another game has come to an end~ And what awaits the victor is, of course, the spoils~ Take whatever you desire~
But here's a reminder: not everyone is worth trusting unconditionally~
WthC_CM-IE.job_intel_expired: This fate ends here... But never forget, you still have the potential for another chance... Chosen one...
WthC_CM-IE.fleet_name: The Phantom Fleet of the Primordial Witch

WthC_CM-SSoul.job_description:
So... after the previous battle, have you {==had an epiphany==}? 
 Perhaps... instead of facing a benefactor, an {==unidentified arrogant figure==} can win the trust of someone from the Persean Sector?
Heh... But don't worry, I never care about {==whispers behind my back==}... just as you imagined~
Though... perhaps it’s time for a {==reunion between old friends==}, don't you think?
For now... even someone as merciful as me will offer some small advice to the ignorant~
The Soul Witch, Su, is a boundary-crossing judge of life and death. Her phantom commands a small but elite fleet. Unconventional time flow and the overwhelming wolfpack tactics make this fragile fleet unleash extraordinary potential.
Prepare for an instant end to your enemies, chosen one attempting to accept this invitation... "Blind faith in others"?
WthC_CM-SSoul.job_comm_reply:
A meaningless death...
......
I {==will not allow...==}
......
As for meaning...
......
It is {==defined by me...==}
WthC_CM-SSoul.job_intel_success: What a touching reunion~ Isn't it?
WthC_CM-SSoul.job_intel_expired: This fate ends here... But never forget, you still have the potential for another chance... Chosen one...
WthC_CM-SSoul.job_pick_option: You wouldn't want to face the undead...
WthC_CM-SSoul.fleet_name: The Phantom Fleet of the Soul Witch

WthC_CM-Elf.job_description:
I admit... I really enjoy {==joking==}~
Or maybe... for someone like me, {==seriousness==} has no meaning~
However... at least because of this, this star system won't face the so-called {==apocalyptic disaster==}... isn't that right~?
Of course... the cost is that it always needs to offer a few {==unlucky souls==} to the so-called demons for entertainment~
What do you think... {=="The most unlucky soul in the Persean Sector"==}? 
For now... even someone as merciful as I will offer some small advice to the ignorant~
The Spirit Commander Witch, Eden Ludwig Faust, is a messenger of celestial gods. Her phantom commands a large carrier fleet, and the numerous warships weaving through missiles will give enemies without decent defense unimaginable problems.
Get ready to face waves of small foes, the chosen one trying to accept this invitation... "Unlucky soul"?
WthC_CM-Elf.job_intel_success:
I hope you like small animals just like her~ Of course, I don't mean as food~
Uh... well, they are not bad in that regard either?
WthC_CM-Elf.job_intel_expired: This fate ends here... But never forget, you still have the potential for another chance... Chosen one...
WthC_CM-Elf.job_pick_option: She won’t be as childish as she seems...

WthC_CM-Dust.job_description:
I must admit... {==you're outstanding==}~ although not the most outstanding one~
But for someone from Perseus, this is already {==worth being proud of==}~
Humans... are not a species that can learn anything in the endless flames of war {==intelligent species==}...
Perhaps... only when they {==self-destruct==} will the one who created all this admit failure.
Of course... the fortunate thing is that perhaps all of this should temporarily... {==come to an end==}.
For now... even someone as merciful as I will offer some small advice to the ignorant~
Dust Witch Nazer is a human god who commands pure power, and her phantom leads a large and elite fleet of destructive ships. Their unmatched destructive power is their only trait.
Destroy them before it’s too late, the one trying to accept this invitation... "Self-destroyer"?
WthC_CM-Dust.job_intel_success:
Congratulations~ You’ve done what no one from Perseus has ever done before~ By the way... they often can't even make it through the opening ceremony~
May your legend continue afterward, the chosen one recognized by the demons...
WthC_CM-Dust.job_intel_expired: This fate ends here... But never forget, you still have the potential for another chance... Chosen one...

WthC_BA-RRA.job_description:
Little do you know... can the phantom I created {==satisfy your desires==}...?
Perhaps you brave ones need a {==more challenging==} form of entertainment?
Well then... why not try facing the {==enemy of possibilities==} that I present personally...
I guarantee you will be fully satisfied... the chosen one who thirsts for the contract...
Perhaps that lord crowned in crimson has already revealed some truth to you...
But I will still give you a word of caution... these reflections born from countless possibilities are not foes that mere mortals can handle...
Have you ever imagined that perhaps the once gentle and kind artist might initiate an irreversible war?
When the kindest of us unleash the terrifying aggression hidden within, even former followers will become more resolute.
However, even with determination, the damage they can cause is still limited, after all, experience in war doesn't just depend on kindness...
WthC_BA-RRA.job_comm_reply:
Another fool has perished because of me...
Another curse was born from appearance...
Well... well... at least now, when I raise the blade with my own hands, I realize how {==foolish past kindness==} truly was!
WthC_BA-RRA.job_intel_success: Well done... perhaps this recognition is what you deserve... chosen one...
WthC_BA-RRA.job_intel_expired: This fate ends here... but never forget, you still have the potential for another chance... chosen one...
WthC_BA-RRA.job_pick_option: Another journey destined to be irreversible...

WthC_BA-Cross.job_description:
Can the scenery forged by these reflections allow you to experience the {==boiling blood==} that erupts from your very essence...?
And those who have already entered the web shall {==continue onward==}...
Until both good and evil, right and wrong acknowledge a person from {==far away lands==}...
Face the most pure of saints... the chosen one thirsting for the contract...
Perhaps that lord crowned in crimson has already revealed some truth to you...
But I will still offer a word of caution... these reflections born from countless possibilities are not foes that mere mortals can handle...
Even though that messenger appears outwardly pure and holy, humanity does not deserve to fully possess them...
The higher the moral ground, the more adept they are at shattering the minds of all things, yet the merciful rain will still forgive those steadfast enough...
WthC_BA-Cross.job_comm_reply:
The holy spirit will forgive all errors in the world...
The gods will judge all sins in the world...
The messenger must witness all good intentions in the world...
And I shall {==act in their stead==}...
WthC_BA-Cross.job_intel_expired: This fate ends here... but never forget, you still have the potential for another chance... chosen one...
WthC_BA-Cross.job_pick_option: Paranoia is as foolish as blind faith...

WthC_BA-IE.job_description:
It begins with {==fire==}... and ends with {==earth==}...
Since all things are elements, can the master of elements {==rule all things==}?
Even with {==omniscience==}... even with {==omnipotence==}...
Those bound in the cage of flesh are nothing but {==pitiful mortals==}...
Perhaps that lord crowned in crimson has already revealed some truth to you...
But I will still offer a word of caution... these reflections born from countless possibilities are not foes that mere mortals can handle...
If that demon had never encountered the first destined being... who would bear this cursed mission that remains?
Even with the sharpest spear and the strongest shield, the light and heat unleashed from the hands can be so deadly... but can the most powerful warrior really face everything alone...?
WthC_BA-IE.job_comm_reply:
I am not her original messenger...
Nor will I be the {==last one==}...
WthC_BA-IE.job_intel_success: So... will you be the last one?
WthC_BA-IE.job_intel_expired: This fate ends here... but never forget, you still have the potential for another chance... chosen one...

WthC_BA-SSoul.job_description:
Have you ever believed in reincarnation... that {==Natural Law==} worthy of reassessing one's entire existence?
But what if it merely stems from a {==hysterical==} obsession?
Just for that non-existent {==cruel aspiration==}...
The soulless shall again bear the {==eternal calamity==} once forgiven...
Perhaps the Crimson Lord has already revealed some truths to you...
Yet I shall still offer a warning... These reflections born from infinite possibilities are not foes that ordinary mortals can overcome...
If not for that paranoid's morbid desires... death might have remained the final peace for all to taste...
And when she fully succumbs to the other side of time... at least this time none shall endure eternally...
WthC_BA-SSoul.job_intel_success: Have you ever imagined the day of facing death with dignity...?
WthC_BA-SSoul.job_intel_expired: This fate ends here... But never forget, you still possess the possibility to begin anew... Chosen One...

WthC_BA-Elf.job_description:
You seem to revel in this... even as each victory brings countless {==senseless deaths==}?
Yet doubt not... this is humanity's {==inherent vileness==}...
Unchanging since the Void Emissary's {==descent from heavens==}...
Tell me... have you witnessed the {==sky-rending spectacle==}?
Perhaps the Crimson Lord has already revealed some truths to you...
Yet I shall still offer a warning... These reflections born from infinite possibilities are not foes that ordinary mortals can overcome...
When divine emissaries abandon their fabricated missions... does that world still need its imaginary sovereign?...
Her spear remains as keen as ever... but can the Eternal One who ventured into the Void be reborn anew?
WthC_BA-Elf.job_comm_reply:
The deities sent me to deliver this message...
Will you choose to {==coexist==} with humanity...?
WthC_BA-Elf.job_intel_success: Memories of the past remain indelible...
WthC_BA-Elf.job_intel_expired: This fate ends here... But never forget, you still possess the possibility to begin anew... Chosen One...

WthC_BA-Dust.job_description:
The spark of rebellion... {==burns eternally==}...
The nova of war... {==still blazes==}...
The reaper of destruction... {==remains ahead==}...
The judgment of annihilation... {==approaches inexorably==}...
Perhaps the Crimson Lord has already revealed some truths to you...
Yet I shall still offer a warning... These reflections born from infinite possibilities are not foes that ordinary mortals can overcome...
Even across myriad worlds... that burdened by fate shall inevitably become the destroyer of shattered constellations...
And you shall face this reaper in mortal flesh... as the finale of this endless epic...
WthC_BA-Dust.job_intel_success: Heh, congratulations... Even if just reflections, you've achieved what I never could...
WthC_BA-Dust.job_intel_expired: This fate ends here... But never forget, you still possess the possibility to begin anew... Chosen One...
WthC_BA-Dust.job_pick_option: Fortune cannot save all living beings...

WthC_AL-1.job_description:
A woman bearing white wings recently obtained a {==special flagship==} from Scarlet City through unknown means.
According to an informed source from the winged species, she ventured to a distant rift space... merely to recover fragments of her lost memories?
Several days ago, probes from this location did detect traces of that warship on a remote rift planet.
However, readings indicate it's surrounded by a large ragtag fleet of scavenged vessels.
Regardless, the Scarlet Lord is offering 500,000 credits for that ship which holds no real significance to her...
Typical of her extravagance, wouldn't you say?
WthC_AL-1.job_comm_reply:
I'm on the verge of discovering the truth... Could you refrain from interfering?
But I suppose... words alone won't resolve this...
May she forgive me... This {==magnificent vessel==} gifted by the kind witch shall ultimately be stained with bloodshed
WthC_AL-1.job_intel_success: The full bounty has been deposited into your account... But has this matter truly been resolved?
WthC_AL-1.job_intel_expired: All traces of the target have vanished... as if it never existed.

WthC_AL-2.job_description: This matter doesn't concern you... You shouldn't delve deeper...{==Persean==}...
WthC_AL-2.job_comm_reply:
Why do you insist on walking into the demon's snare?
You comprehend nothing...
WthC_AL-2.job_intel_success: Do you not fear such unknowns?... Should you proceed, prepare to make enemies of them...

WthC_AL-3.job_description:
This time... The invitation comes directly from me.
After all, someone as intriguing as you shouldn't miss this grand ceremony~
The angel carries the coronet meant for royalty, awaiting only the pilgrims' arrival...
WthC_AL-3.job_comm_reply: At last... I've returned to my homeland...
WthC_AL-3.job_intel_success: Grieve not... I shall remember her sacrifice for eternity.

WthC_CAP.job_description:
Congratulations... {==distant stars==}-born Persean.
Recognition... Though seemingly {==ephemeral==}, remains priceless in the material universe.
Perhaps... I've found {==sufficient worth==} within this sector.
The time has come... to bestow upon you the {==treasure==} she obtained from the Domain of the Ancients.
Good luck... and may I {==enjoy myself==}~
WthC_CAP.job_comm_reply: Come... This should prove entertaining enough, I believe.

WthC_LastEnd.job_description:
Like big ships~?
The kind of massive super-dreadnoughts~?
That blue dude has one in his possession~
It awaits you in the castle~
Smash it and claim it as yours!
WthC_LastEnd.job_comm_reply:
Do you understand single-ship supremacy doctrine...?
You think you do but you don't!
Bring it on if you dare!
WthC_LastEnd.job_intel_success: Get rekt! Get rekt! Get rekt!

WthC_IL-hegemony.job_description:
If my assumptions are correct, you must be the {==Contemporary Legend==} renowned throughout the Persean Sector...
Allow me to extend my utmost respect to you, the {==most formidable==} fleet commander in human history.
If you've already become {==invincible==}, finding no worthy challenges to prove your valor...
Then accept this invitation from the Void to participate in a {==death game==} reserved for true warriors against ancient traditions of this sector!
A straightforward fleet trial against a random Hegemony fleet with most fleet skills, total deployment points around 600.
Recommended for pure fleet capability testing under specific rules, this contract offers minimal additional rewards.
However, you may recover all destroyed ships without affecting relations with major factions.
WthC_IL-hegemony.job_difficultyDescription:
A straightforward fleet trial against a random Hegemony fleet with most fleet skills, total deployment points around 600.
Recommended for pure fleet capability testing under specific rules, this contract offers minimal additional rewards.
However, you may recover all destroyed ships without affecting relations with major factions.

WthC_IL-tritachyon.job_description:
If I'm not mistaken, you must be the {==contemporary legend==} that has spread throughout the entire Persean Sector...
Please allow me to extend the most solemn respect to you, the {==most powerful==} fleet commander in human history.
If by now you have become {==unstoppable==}, and can no longer find any venue to prove your worth...
Then why not accept this invitation from the void, and engage in a {==death game==} that belongs only to heroes within this star sector~!
It's a fairly straightforward fleet test, with just a random phase fleet possessing most fleet skills, with a total deployment point of around 600.
It is recommended to use this bounty purely to test your current fleet strength under certain rules, with almost no additional rewards.
However, you still have the chance to recover all sunken ships without affecting the goodwill of any mainstream factions.
WthC_IL-tritachyon.job_difficultyDescription:
It's a fairly straightforward fleet test, with just a random hegemon fleet possessing most fleet skills, with a total deployment point of around 600.
It is recommended to use this bounty purely to test your current fleet strength under certain rules, with almost no additional rewards.
However, you still have the chance to recover all sunken ships without affecting the goodwill of any mainstream factions.

It is recommended to use this bounty purely to test your current fleet strength under certain rules, with almost no additional rewards.
However, you still have the chance to recover all sunken ships without affecting the goodwill of any mainstream factions.

If by now you have already become {==invincible==}, and can find no venue to prove your worth...
Then why not accept this invitation from the void, and engage in a {==death game==} that belongs only to the brave, with the ancient traditions of this star sector~!
A rather simple fleet test against a random Remnant fleet, with a total deployment point of around 400.
It is recommended to use this bounty purely to test your current fleet strength under certain rules, and this bounty offers almost no additional rewards.
However, you still have the chance to recover all sunken ships without affecting the goodwill of any mainstream factions.

WthC_DR-RRA.job_name: Classic Romance: Blue and White Beauty
WthC_DR-RRA.job_description:
The most classic {==traditional beauty==} character design...!
{==Airhead==}, {==long black hair==}, {==gentle and caring==}, {==passively charming==}...
So in reality, it seems like she has {==no distinctive traits==}...
But you wouldn't dislike the {==blue and white color scheme==}, would you?
She's the {==main character==} of this show, so no need to say more.
WthC_DR-RRA.job_comm_reply: Sorry, but I won't fall for you...
WthC_DR-RRA.fleet_name: Fleet of Blue and White Beauty

WthC_DR-Cross.job_description:
A {==phenomenal==} popular TAG, isn't it...?
There's a strong sense of {==immorality and corruption==}, right...?
But I think it might just be that the {==black and white nun outfit==} is appealing...?
And it's {==big enough==}, okay, big enough.
They say those who like this size are {==lacking maternal love==}...
Or maybe, {==missing a horse==}?
WthC_DR-Cross.job_comm_reply: Don't ask why I'm not wearing a nun outfit...
WthC_DR-Cross.job_pick_option: Though it doesn't look like a nun...

WthC_DR-IE.job_description:
The most {==costume-like==} episode... It's like the epitome of costumes in the costume world.
{==Totally nailing==} your XP, right...?
{==White hair, white clothes, white hat==}, what do you think...?
If you don't like it, please {==delete this MOD immediately==}, thanks.
WthC_DR-IE.job_comm_reply: The cape is the soul, okay, the cape...

WthC_DR-SSoul.job_description:
Ugh... Have you seen this kind of character design in {==certain works==}?
But it's {==really appealing==}, isn't it...?
Don't tell me you can't accept something {==not quite human==}...
Anyway, after {==paperization==}, it's all the same, right?
WthC_DR-SSoul.job_comm_reply: Do you think I have weight...?
WthC_DR-SSoul.job_pick_option: Actually, there's a bit of a connection...

WthC_DR-Elf.job_name: Classic Romance: The Loli Who Fell from the Sky
WthC_DR-Elf.job_description:
The {==loli who fell from the sky==} is destined to defeat the childhood friend... Her appearance is sure to create a loser...
Once a big sister, now a loli... What's this about a {==loli mom==}?
If you're into this kind of thing, you need to {==reflect deeply==}, I think.
WthC_DR-Elf.job_comm_reply: Baby, you are such a baby...
WthC_DR-Elf.fleet_name: The Fleet of the Loli Who Fell from the Sky

WthC_DR-Dust.job_name: Classic Romance: The Black-Haired, Long-Straight-Haired Ojou-sama
WthC_DR-Dust.job_description:
The most {==elegant==} episode... or the most widely accepted fetish?
Who doesn't like {==black-haired, long-straight-haired==} girls? Who doesn't like {==ojou-sama==}?
So, can you {==subdue her==}?
{==Can you==}? {==Can you==}? {==Can you==}? {==Can you==}? {==Can you==}? {==Can you==}? {==Can you==}?
WthC_DR-Dust.fleet_name: The Fleet of the Black-Haired, Long-Straight-Haired Ojou-sama

WthC_10086001.job_description: No one can live forever, and I only wish to burn brightly.
WthC_10086001.job_comm_reply: Today is the day to meet our fate with courage!
WthC_10086001.job_intel_success: I never wanted to live forever.
WthC_10086001.job_intel_expired: Today is not my day to die, but it is yours.
WthC_10086001.job_pick_option: A pack of desperate wolves, do you think you can win? Hehe, maybe~

WthC_10086002.job_description: Sacrifice is the cornerstone of humanity.
WthC_10086002.job_comm_reply: Let's begin, we will never retreat.
WthC_10086002.job_pick_option: A fleet that has been in exile, they have nothing but passion, and here is where they will rest.

WthC_10086003.job_description: Our fleet will eclipse the sky, no matter how many suns there are.
WthC_10086003.job_intel_success: The last friendly ship has gone silent, the Photonians have been annihilated.
WthC_10086003.job_intel_expired: The last enemy ship has ceased activity, the Photonians have crushed the enemy.
WthC_10086003.job_pick_option: A heartless war machine, though that statement is questionable.

WthC_10086004.job_intel_success: If you don't hurt me, I'll do anything...
WthC_10086004.job_intel_expired: Hehe, big brother is so powerless~
WthC_10086004.fleet_name: Your Excellency~ Your Excellency~~ Your Excellency~~~

WthC_10086005.job_description: Doo doo doo, doo doo doo, doo doo doo doo doo.
WthC_10086005.job_intel_success: It's okay to lose, this is just numbers.
WthC_10086005.job_intel_expired: You are the god of distant gods.

Valkyrja_novtry_1.job_description:
Based on the intelligence you've provided, I've decided to establish a new unit capable of countering unknown threats.
Although I cannot speak for the entire military, I personally thank you all. Can you tell me one last thing?
I want to know the truth about the Dawn Battle that ended the Cult Incident...

Valkyrja_novtry_2.job_name: Crimson Lotus, Earth's End, Devastation, Frost Mist
Valkyrja_novtry_2.job_description:
This is a message left by a mysterious individual with a desire to save the world. Details are unknown.
You may decide whether to accept it or not, but please be cautious.
gnoiquwadil ihz ner us ial nayouh ihz nahs

Valkyrja_novtry_3.job_name: The Filthy Calamity of the Wind God
Valkyrja_novtry_3.job_description:
I have heard from Id about the formless state of Huracan. 'Nothingness' is the conceptual form of 'Calamity' among the Star Beasts that have existed since the beginning. It should not exist.
Angra Mainyu is now asleep, so there should be no need to worry... but can you tell me more about it?

Valkyrja_novtry_4.job_name: The Tainted Radiance of the Wolf God
Valkyrja_novtry_4.job_description:
I heard you fought against Managarmr·Void. That is an existence that rivals Galanza-sama at full power.
Can you tell me about it? I am planning to write a book praising Galanza-sama's heroic deeds, so I would love to know more... please!

Valkyrja_novtry_5.job_name: The Tyrannical Fear of the Fire God
Valkyrja_novtry_5.job_description:
We would like to hear how you defeated Vulkan Bora·Void.
Although the young lady says it's for the sake of Blade's honor, we also wish to remember this resolve.
We apologize for making you recall a difficult battle, but please grant us this wish!

Valkyrja_novtry_6.job_name: Become a Couple and Witness the End Together
Valkyrja_novtry_6.job_description:
There is no superiority between poetry and painting. We have shared mutual respect and experienced many things... The other day, we got married.
Perhaps this bond was also thanks to you? In the end... let us, as a couple, depict and recite, bringing the heroic epic to a close.
Shall we create a happy ending for all?

Valkyrja_novtry_7.job_description:
A heartless band of thieves stole treasure from the dragon's lair, enraging two dragons. If this continues, the entire island may fall into the depths of the sky.
Another team will search for the thieves and the treasure, so please go and suppress the dragons.

Valkyrja_novtry_8.job_description:
The remnants of the cult went to the Spirit Peak, seemingly to seek the assistance of dragons. However, their failed negotiations caused two dragons to lose control.
Even a single dragon possesses immeasurable power. We need your help!

Valkyrja_novtry_9.job_name: The White Wolf's Conviction and Blade's Resolve
Valkyrja_novtry_9.job_description:
If we issue a request here, you'll help with anything, right?
The young lady of Blade is also full of enthusiasm. This time, we will be unstoppable!
Well then... let's have a life-or-death battle!

Valkyrja_novtry_10.job_description: Please go and defeat the mechanical giant that has appeared near Dali Island~ The vanguard unit, composed of seasoned skyfarers, has been completely wiped out, and the entire airspace is under strict lockdown. So, make sure you are fully prepared before setting out~ Please be careful~

Valkyrja_novtry_11.job_name: Convenience Store Scroll: 'The Black-Silver Wings Soaring Through the Clouds'
Valkyrja_novtry_11.job_description:
When we first met, you mentioned that Bahamut went out of control, right?
I want to use this as the basis for a children's story. Could you tell me more about it?
Ah, I'll handle the embellishments! I'll turn it into an exciting adventure!

WthC_Ju1.job_description: 一支迷了路的卢德货运舰队，从这里拿走所有的补给和燃油真是个不错的主意。

WthC_Ju2.job_description: 一堆飞行的太空垃圾，来看烟火大会吧。不过烟花从侧面看是圆的还是扁的？
WthC_Ju2.job_pick_option: 全英仙座最盛大的烟火大会

WthC_Ju3.job_description: 不做无法实现的梦，不是放弃对理想的追求，而是理智地审视现实，脚踏实地前行。梦想如灯塔照亮远方，但若遥不可及，不如调整航向，找寻更适合自己的目标。人生的价值，在于勇敢追梦的同时，也在于清醒认知自我，务实奋斗，让每一个踏出的步伐都坚实有力，每一份付出都有所收获。在力所能及的范围内，描绘并实现那些触手可及的梦想，才是生活的真谛所在。
WthC_Ju3.job_pick_option: 不想看可以骂两句没必要划走

WthC_ykm_psmhunt_1.job_description:
A legend lost in the quantum sea
A great fleet that existed in legend before the founding of Prasrity, their battered souls hoped to find a place of peace with the patched-up scrap beneath their feet
No one knows if they succeeded, but faint ripples remain in the cosmic dust. Perhaps you can see something in these memories.
Don't be sad, this is just a condensed illusion. The people of the fleet left behind the most hopeful expectations in their words, even if the outcome was already decided.
WthC_ykm_psmhunt_1.job_comm_reply: Where is this? Who are you? We... home... (unintelligible tones)
WthC_ykm_psmhunt_1.job_intel_success: The scouting fleet has completely dissipated into cosmic dust
WthC_ykm_psmhunt_1.job_intel_expired: Your fleet was defeated, but there's still a chance

WthC_ykm_psmhunt_2.job_description:
The legend continues to unfold
The fleet's collapse began with a small oversight by the scouts, who misjudged the brutal turbulence in hyperspace
The grieving people would not easily abandon their comrades, for they had no way back
Women and children covered the portholes, no longer asking about the voyage
Only the flickering sparks left behind by the fleet remained silent.
The witches' consciousness begins to invade the spreading ripples. Be prepared.
WthC_ykm_psmhunt_2.job_comm_reply: Go! We... leave this place... (unintelligible tones)
WthC_ykm_psmhunt_2.job_intel_success: The rescue fleet has drifted away with the dream currents
WthC_ykm_psmhunt_2.job_intel_expired: Your fleet was defeated, but there's still a chance

WthC_ykm_psmhunt_3.job_description:
The curtain is mostly lifted
Endless days without an end gradually brought fear and despair. People silently salvaged ships, recycling their comrades' bodies as organic material
Some began to plot other things, slowly building a small mountain from unnoticed scrap
Outside the already cracked windows, fear and loneliness fermented into suspicion, until they became bombs.

Be careful, the witches' presence has interfered with their dreams. Many unusual things may appear...
WthC_ykm_psmhunt_3.job_intel_success: The backbone fleet has scattered into flashes of light disappearing among the stars
WthC_ykm_psmhunt_3.job_intel_expired: Your fleet was defeated, but there's still a chance

WthC_ykm_psmhunt_4.job_description:
The full panorama of the legend is revealed
Like all illusions, people met their destruction in battles with each other
The world is not small, we don't need to trample each other, but everyone knows
Even if only two people remained in the world, even if they had everything they could ever want
They would still fight to the end
In a corner of the flames of conflict that no one noticed, a small cabin flew towards the path home.

This is the end. Prepare to face their amplified hatred and sorrow.
WthC_ykm_psmhunt_4.job_intel_success: They returned to the void. Perhaps legends should remain as legends
WthC_ykm_psmhunt_4.job_intel_expired: Your fleet was defeated, but there's still a chance

WthC_ykm_psmhunt_5.job_description:
Application record from researcher ksr-Psm-rls-2
(The preceding section has been fully encrypted and is unreadable)...has a deep connection with Prasrity. Rumors suggest that the command AI of their vanguard fleet (referred to as: Ink) is a remnant of their early expeditions.
I don't understand why the higher-ups are so secretive about this. In the Persean Sector, the use of AI cores is no longer a secret, though it is rare to see one so well-tamed.
Especially considering the combat style of the Ink fleet, it's hard to imagine that they are not so different from the cyan-hulled ships of the outer sectors.
I can only hope that the higher-ups will approve a small research budget to allow me to track their development path.
Automatic reply from the tri central management system:
Earlier, researcher k-p-r-2 went missing from their company dormitory. No traces of their movements have been found. According to standard management procedures, the application will be closed in 5 solar days.
Interested staff should submit proposals to the nearest management personnel. The company will seriously consider their necessity.
Automatic reply from the tri central management system:
Application closed.
WthC_ykm_psmhunt_5.job_intel_success: They have vanished, and it is unclear if they were truly defeated.

WthC_DR-MIZUGI.job_description:
If spring is the red backpack of dawn, then summer is the swimsuit of midday.
As the body matures, it resembles the first light of dawn, with a peach-colored nape, slender and delicate.
This was especially true in elementary school, regardless of gender.
A light touch of the fingertips is amusing, and overlapping bodies is also a form of play.
WthC_DR-MIZUGI.job_comm_reply: I can feel the police's gaze
WthC_DR-MIZUGI.job_intel_success:
A whisper seems to reach my ears...
Elementary school students are the best
WthC_DR-MIZUGI.job_intel_expired: I still can't beat elementary school students...
WthC_DR-MIZUGI.job_difficultyDescription: The lively and active children are eager to get close to you, and just once won't satisfy them

WthC_DR-NIKUSHOKU.job_name: I'm Doomed, Surrounded by Predatory Older Women
WthC_DR-NIKUSHOKU.job_description:
Predatory older women, sounds enticing, doesn't it? But that's just the camouflage of a predator, the honey that lures weak insects.
If they catch you, it won't be good. From your skin to your insides, you'll be devoured raw, your entire body dyed in their colors. When you gaze into the abyss of predatory older women, it's already too late...
Because,
WthC_DR-NIKUSHOKU.job_comm_reply: I have the illusion of being eaten alive...
WthC_DR-NIKUSHOKU.job_intel_success:
A whisper seems to reach my ears...
Next time, more predatory older women
WthC_DR-NIKUSHOKU.job_intel_expired: I still can't beat predatory older women...
WthC_DR-NIKUSHOKU.job_pick_option: The abyss is also gazing at you
WthC_DR-NIKUSHOKU.job_difficultyDescription: Predatory older women have voluptuous bodies and will drain your energy

WthC_DR-HANABI.job_description: Let's go to the summer fireworks festival together!
WthC_DR-HANABI.job_comm_reply: Find a good spot, it's about to start
WthC_DR-HANABI.job_intel_success: After the classical fireworks masters disperse, a unique contract card quietly appears in your captain's quarters
WthC_DR-HANABI.job_intel_expired: Failed failed failed failed failed failed failed failed failed failed failed failed failed failed failed failed

Please upgrade your TriPad...

 A creation ... strange abilities? Truly small but not merciful

It will surely return it will surely return it will surely return return return return return
